mapper.select: SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT city_id) FROM ( SELECT ut.city_id AS city_id FROM user_trip ut WHERE ut.user_id = #{userId} AND ut.status = 1 UNION SELECT s.city_id AS city_id FROM user_checkin_spot uc INNER JOIN spot s ON uc.spot_id = s.id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND s.status = 1 ) city_union ) AS visitedCityCount, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_favorite_spot uf INNER JOIN spot s ON uf.spot_id = s.id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND s.status = 1 ) AS favoriteSpotCount, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_checkin_spot uc INNER JOIN spot s ON uc.spot_id = s.id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND s.status = 1 ) AS checkinSpotCount, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_trip ut WHERE ut.user_id = #{userId} AND ut.status = 1 ) AS tripCount, ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ut.days), 0) FROM user_trip ut WHERE ut.user_id = #{userId} AND ut.status = 1 ) AS totalTravelDays, COALESCE( ( SELECT c.city_name FROM user_checkin_spot uc INNER JOIN spot s ON uc.spot_id = s.id LEFT JOIN city c ON s.city_id = c.id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND s.status = 1 ORDER BY uc.checkin_time DESC, uc.id DESC LIMIT 1 ), ( SELECT c.city_name FROM user_trip ut LEFT JOIN city c ON ut.city_id = c.id WHERE ut.user_id = #{userId} AND ut.status = 1 ORDER BY ut.created_at DESC, ut.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) AS recentCityName
